description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An unoccupied Zoox autonomous vehicle was traveling in the right lane on northwest-bound 9th Street, slowing and preparing 
to make a right turn onto Mission Street with a green traffic light. Partway through the right turn, the Zoox vehicle further slowed 
to yield to a pedestrian crossing Mission St, and at that time, a cyclist traveling northwest on the adjacent sidewalk rapidly 
entered the crosswalk. The Zoox vehicle braked to yield to the approaching cyclist, and the cyclist made contact with the right 
rear side of the nearly stopped Zoox vehicle. The bicycle fell to the ground, but its rider remained upright. The cyclist picked up 
their bicycle and rode away from the scene. Shortly after, the Zoox vehicle resumed operation to return to base. There was 
minor damage to the Zoox vehicle. There were no reported injuries, and police were not notified. 
Print
Clear Form
